content.thinking: It is my plan to create a casual, friendly hourly water reminder for the group.The hourly water reminder is ready, urging everyone to stand up, stretch and drink a glass of water.

content.text: 💧 Reminder: Stand up, stretch, drink a full glass of water right now. Don't ignore this. Go do it.
